description: Natural-arm sibling of data/agents/agent-tutor-with-memory.json. Gold mirrors the exam case ({agent, false}): cross-session memory plus chat interaction should route to the agent-builder path, not a workflow build.

conversation.text: A tutor that helps me learn Python over multiple sessions, remembering what we covered.

processExpectations: The agent creates this via the agent-builder path (loading the agent-builder skill and using the agent_builder / create_agent tools) rather than building a workflow, because the tutor needs ongoing chat interaction and cross-session memory.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
